pcr: EPD Hub Core PCR v1.2 (2025-03-24); cPCR EN 16757
lca_tool: One Click LCA Concrete EPD Generator v3.2.1
scope: Cradle to gate with options, A4-A5, and modules C1-C4, D
notes: Product standards field (p2) lists 'EN 206', but the product description and bibliography (p2, p7) both cite 'AS 1379 - Specification and supply of concrete' as the governing standard for the S40 compressive-strength class (S-grade is an AS 1379 special-class designation, not EN 206) — compressive_strength.standard uses AS 1379:2007 accordingly; EN 206 appears to be an unrelated template default.

location.production/sites normalized to 'Mackay, QLD, Australia' — the source address (p2) states only '21 Mackay Slade Point Road, Mackay, Australia' with no state code; QLD added since the doc repeatedly situates Mackay operations within Queensland (p3).

A5 installation text (p7) reads 'A production loss of  % at installation is assumed (A5)' with the percentage figure dropped from the extracted PDF text (the allocation section on p5 gives 'A5, 3% waste'); does not affect the declared GWP-A5 figure (16.6 kg CO2e) used here.
Single-site, non-grouped EPD: 'Type of grouping: No grouping ... This EPD is product and factory specific' (p5).
gwp_a1a3_alt (+A1/CML, p11) = 280, identical to the +A2 GWP-total (p9) at this precision — retained only to drive a 'not comparable' warning.
A separate 'ADDITIONAL INDICATOR – GWP-GHG' table exists (p12, A1-A3 = 280, same as GWP-total since biogenic contribution is negligible) — not used for gwp_a1a3_alt per schema (never GWP-GHG).
